summary: Verified /services page (frontend-only). All 6 sections render in order (hero, superapp, grid, why, africa, cta). Hero shows 'NOS SERVICES' FR with 'SERVICES' in gold + 'OUR SERVICES' EN. Both FR CTA buttons ('Découvrir nos solutions', 'Télécharger l'application') present. Super App section has central baked logo (/logos/baked-header.png) + exactly 6 orbital icons (lucide-truck, utensils-crossed, shopping-cart, shopping-bag, car, house). Services grid: title 'NOS DOMAINES D'EXPERTISE' (FR) and 'OUR AREAS OF EXPERTISE' (EN); EXACTLY 6 cards [service-card-0..5] with image, icon chip, title, description, 'En savoir plus'/'Learn more', circular arrow — FR titles match the specified order; EN translates correctly. Why Choose Baked: 4 benefit cards (FR + EN variants) and 4 animated counters render '6+', '1', '24/7', '100%' on a 'bg-bg-primary' dark inner panel with correct FR labels (Services Principaux, Super App, Disponibilité, Orienté Client) and EN labels (Core Services, Super App, Availability, Customer-First). Digital Africa: background image + heading 'Construire l'avenir numérique de l'Afrique.' with the 'l'avenir numérique' wrapped in span.text-brand-gold; EN equivalent 'Building Africa's digital future.' also works. CTA: 'Rejoignez la révolution numérique avec Baked.' with 'révolution numérique' in gold; gold-gradient 'Télécharger l'application' → /#mobile and outlined 'Nous contacter' → /#contact. Header active highlight verified: 3rd nav link is 'NOS SERVICES' with .text-brand-gold ONLY on /services; on /, /about-us and /careers the same link href=/services does NOT have text-brand-gold and clicking it navigates to /services. SEO HTML: <title>Nos Services | Baked Group</title> exact, meta description contains 'Découvrez les services innovants', and JSON-LD with @type:'Service' present. Regression: /, /about-us, /careers, /admin/login all return 200; homepage still has 6 ecosystem cards.
critical_code_review_comments: Hydration mismatch warning logged in console on /services for the orbital chips inside SuperAppSection. Server-rendered style uses simplified 'calc(50% - 132px)' / 'calc(50% - 205.205px)' while client-rendered style uses 'calc(50% + Xpx - 32px)' (the formula `calc(50% + ${x}px - 32px)` produces e.g. left:'calc(50% + -100px - 32px)'). React tolerates it but it pollutes the console. Suggest computing left/top as a single resolved value (e.g. `${50}% + ${x - 32}px` collapsed to a number) or rendering the chips client-only via dynamic import with ssr:false to silence the warning.
ServicesContent.tsx is ~345 lines and bundles 5 client subcomponents + Counter. Consider splitting into src/app/services/sections/*.tsx for parity with about-us suggestion from previous iterations.
Hero 'Discover our solutions' link is a plain <a href='#grid'> rather than Next <Link>. Fine for same-page anchor but inconsistent with the rest (other anchors use <Link>); not a bug.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@baked.group / BakedAdmin2025! (page reachable, not exercised this iteration)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All /services acceptance criteria for this iteration pass. Useful testids: services-page, services-hero, services-hero-title, services-superapp, services-grid, service-card-0..5, services-why, services-africa, services-cta. Lang switcher uses lang-button + lang-option-fr/en and persists via I18nProvider. Header link to /services is the 3rd anchor inside [data-testid='header-nav'] (also data-testid='nav-link-nos-services' in FR / 'nav-link-services' in EN — depends on locale label). Note hydration mismatch warning for orbital chip positioning — cosmetic only.
